_comment: Endpoint-level binding-precision probes. Unlike the host-level dogfooding gold, these judge whether the RIGHT endpoint class ranks on top (e.g. an actual /register endpoint, not a pricing/availability lookup on the same host). 'relevant' / 'relevant_path' = true match; 'decoy' = a near-miss in the same intent bucket that should NOT rank above the true matches. An endpoint counts relevant iff (relevant matches summary OR relevant_path matches the URL path) AND decoy does NOT match. type=collision → the gate should raise P@k; type=clean → regression guard, the gate must not lower P@k.

probes.query: register a domain name for my startup
probes.expect: an endpoint that actually registers/buys a new domain (not pricing, availability, name-gen, parse, DNS, or BYOD-connect)

probes.query: find restaurant reviews near my hotel
probes.expect: reviews of places/restaurants/hotels/local businesses (Tripadvisor, Yelp, Google Maps), not product/ecommerce reviews

probes.query: what is the weather forecast for Paris tomorrow
what is the current price of bitcoin in usd
extract the text from this scanned receipt image
probes.expect: OCR / text extraction from an image or document

probes.query: convert this paragraph into spoken audio
get the latitude and longitude for this street address
